test_description: Run the focused public interface contract test module after adding the new formalization surface.
expected_output: The interface package imports cleanly and all interface tests pass.
notes: This run also verified the `harnessiq.shared` lazy-export fix by exercising the public `harnessiq.interfaces` import path.

test_description: Run adjacent interface consumers that depend on output-sink and dynamic-tool-selector contracts.
expected_output: Adjacent public-contract tests continue to pass after the interface and shared-package changes.
notes: Confirms the package-init change did not break nearby interface consumers.

test_description: Run shared-manifest and validated shared-module tests after converting `harnessiq.shared` to lazy exports.
expected_output: Shared-package imports and manifest exports continue to behave correctly.
notes: This targets the package most directly affected by the import-cycle fix.
